title: actinotus minor
intro: Actinotus minor, also known as the Flannel Flower, is a flowering plant native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Actinotus minor include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve skin health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Actinotus minor can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used topically for skin issues, or taken internally for its medicinal properties.
